raw_consumer_statement:
Someone on XX/XX/XXXX made a fraudulent purchase of {$440.00} on my account without my knowledge. I called CitiBank in XX/XX/XXXX to dispute these charges. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received paper work from CitiBank Security Operations ( phone # XXXX ) stating that I'm responsible for this transaction. CitiBank stated that in their report that the XXXX tracking # XXXX shipping address matches the billing address. Well, the shipping address DOESN'T match the billing address. This fraudulent purchase was signed by someone I DO NOT KNOW named XXXX, left with him at the front desk. 
I filed a police report with Reading Police Department XXXX with XXXX XXXX # XXXX Assignment # XXXX. 

CitiBank is stating I'm delinquent and I have a pass due bill while this is under investigation by CitiBank and to top it all off my Credit Score dropped 64 points. THIS IS NOT FAIR! It's XXXX .... 
Since XX/XX/XXXX I have been fighting this endless cause with no end in sight. This needs attention ASAP!!!! 
They should not be allowed to get away with this. I also closed my account XX/XX/XXXX.
